Furnace Heating Element Voltage Trend.condition: If voltage trend increases above normal baseline, investigate element aging / replacement.

Pyrometer Alignment + Window Cleanliness.fields: Window cleanliness score; Alignment note; Furnace temp stability note
Pyrometer Alignment + Window Cleanliness.condition: If pyrometer alignment drifts or the window is dirty, clean and re-check before running.
Pyrometer Alignment + Window Cleanliness.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and inspect pyrometer alignment/window.

Storage Vacuum Rise.condition: If storage vacuum rises above the allowed limit, trigger purge / leak maintenance.
Storage Vacuum Rise.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and schedule purge/leak check.

Clean-Air Velocity.fields: Airflow (m/s); Intake Temp (degC); Fibre position note
Clean-Air Velocity.condition: If clean-air velocity is outside the allowed window, correct airflow and inspect filters.
Clean-Air Velocity.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and schedule airflow/filter maintenance.

Interlocks Test.fields: Water flow interlock; Gas flow interlock; Alarm note
Interlocks Test.condition: If any furnace water/gas interlock fails, maintenance must be triggered before operation.
Interlocks Test.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and block operation until interlock issue is resolved.

X-Y Alignment.fields: X offset (mm); Y offset (mm); Fibre position note
X-Y Alignment.condition: If X/Y offset grows beyond alignment tolerance, launch alignment maintenance.
X-Y Alignment.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and schedule alignment correction.

Fibre Position Centering.fields: Fibre position note; Window center error (mm); Line speed note

thresholds.Trigger Label: Fibre moved too close to measurement window edge

Fibre Position Centering.condition: If fibre position drifts from center when clean-air starts, correct airflow and alignment before running.
Fibre Position Centering.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and inspect fibre position / airflow settings.

Tension Gauge Calibration.fields: Tare error; Span error; Calibration note
Tension Gauge Calibration.condition: If the tension gauge will not calibrate or drifts outside tolerance, trigger calibration service / replacement path.
Tension Gauge Calibration.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and inspect/return load cell as required.

Bearing Play + Rotation.fields: Bearing play (mm); Rotation feel; Cleanliness note
Bearing Play + Rotation.condition: If pulley rotation is rough or bearing play is significant, launch bearing maintenance.
Bearing Play + Rotation.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and schedule pulley/bearing maintenance.

Top Cap Erosion.fields: Top cap length reduction (mm); Erosion note; Fibre strength note
Top Cap Erosion.condition: If bottom sleeve top cap erosion exceeds the allowed range, replace it.
Top Cap Erosion.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and schedule top cap replacement.

Bottom Door Distortion.fields: Door distortion note; Gas curtain note; Fibre contact note
Bottom Door Distortion.condition: If bottom door distortion or damage is found, replace before further running.
Bottom Door Distortion.action: Set PREP_NEEDED and schedule bottom door replacement.
